name: flappy-bird-calm-edition
description: A cinematic, calm, accessible, dependency-free Flappy Bird with golden godrays, living bird character, and serene atmosphere. Browser + PWA, zero dependencies.

scripts.check: node --check game.js && node --check service-worker.js && node tests/static-checks.mjs && node tests/engine-test.mjs && node tests/smoke-test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npx -y -p typescript@5 tsc -p jsconfig.json && npx -y -p typescript@5 tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,WebWorker service-worker.js
